identity.name: FoodBridge
identity.description: AI-powered logistics for surplus food redistribution.

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

dashboard.donor: Bento Grid: Top stats (Meals Donated, CO2 Saved), Left main panel (Active Donations), Right panel (Recent Activity/Notifications)
dashboard.receiver: Feed Layout: Map view toggle + List of nearby available donations (Card based)
dashboard.volunteer: Map Centric: Full screen Leaflet map with bottom sheet for delivery details
dashboard.admin: Dense Data Grid: Heatmaps, User tables, Verification queues

marketing.hero: Split layout or Centered with floating food elements. Use organic shapes (blobs) in Sage Green behind images.
marketing.impact: Big numbers, clean typography, parallax scrolling images.

buttons.primary: bg-[#228B22] text-white hover:bg-[#1A6B1A] active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-100 font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-full shadow-lg shadow-green-900/10
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FFFFF0] text-[#228B22] border border-[#228B22] hover:bg-[#F0F4E8] active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-100 font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-full
buttons.ghost: text-stone-600 hover:text-[#228B22] hover:bg-stone-100 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-[#8A9A5B] transition-colors duration-200
cards.interactive: cursor-pointer hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 ease-out

inputs.default: bg-white border border-stone-200 focus:border-[#228B22] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#228B22]/20 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-all outline-none text-stone-800 placeholder:text-stone-400

hero.description: Community gathering/celebration, good for 'Impact' or 'About Us' section.
Group of people standing together - Team/Volunteers section

food_items.description: Crate of fresh vegetables - Use for 'Raw Ingredients' or 'Farm' donations.
Prepared gourmet meal - Use for 'Restaurant Surplus' donations.
Clean cardboard box - Use for 'Packaging' or 'Shipment' icons/placeholders.

avatars.description: Chef avatar - Use for Donor profile demo.
Happy male volunteer - Use for Volunteer profile demo.

logistics.description: Delivery scooter - Use for tracking status or 'On the way' visual.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_LIBRARIES: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react react-map-gl leaflet react-leaflet recharts framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge`
MAP_INTEGRATION: Use 'react-leaflet'. Do NOT use Google Maps (it requires API key). Use OpenStreetMap tiles.
THEME: Default to Light Mode. The user requested 'Ivory White' background. Ensure 'dark' classes are present but secondary.
COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn UI. Remove default rounded-md and use 'rounded-xl' or 'rounded-full' as per the design guidelines.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text on Sage Green (#8A9A5B) is white (#FFFFFF) or very dark (#1C1917) depending on size. Check contrast.
ROLES: Ensure distinct navigation/dashboard views for Donor (Upload focus), Receiver (Browse focus), Volunteer (Map focus).
MOBILE: Volunteer view MUST be optimized for mobile (bottom sheet navigation, big map touch targets).
TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) for containers.
Never use pure black (#000000); use #1C1917 or #0A0A0A.
Use 'manrope' for headings and 'public-sans' for body.
Animate entrance of lists using framer-motion (staggerChildren).
All forms must have client-side validation (Zod).
